author: @AvaKao-w6d
text: man the fact that they made such important stories cost so much is really sad. Like, things that are so important for the main story shouldn't be locked or at least more accessible. Costing 7 out of max of 10 is basically saying, you can only do one maybe 2 a week if you combine a 3 cost story, so if someone like me who just started and am playing the story non stop... yeah, sad to see they've made it this way. Especially when the story is the main point of the game.

Are there any chapters you regret not reading early enough?

text:
As a new player I agree with Myriams sidestory being amazing. Tbh I liked it more than all the main chapters so much. I was very suprised as I did it at first purely for the posse. Not expecting to enjoy the story as in the main chapters Myriam didnt really feel that interesting.

Personally I think this is best read after chapter 5 instead of 6. So you actually have more context for chapter 6 and enjoy it a lot more.

author: @user-tv8ck8bd2g
text:
I was someone who got into Morimens from your video on Gray Raven Radio and I finished Arc 1 Chapter 1 after about 2 weeks. 
I was interested in the story, but I ended up getting a slightly confusing one without knowing which side stories to go through. 

Thanks for this video! I can go back and piece together what happened in Arc 1 easier now.

author: @Luinta
text:
This video is a GODSEND! Thank you! 
I'm just starting this game thanks to your video on the other channel and I'm already deeply invested in the story an characters. I know that a lot of Arc 1 got shortened back when they thought they were going to EoS, and I'm expecting some story or pacing issues due to that, but I wasn't expecting to miss crucial content in the side stories. Though I am very happy to hear that there is more story to find ^_^

author: @Woodenscrolls
text:
Discovered the extra 2 verges per day from the premium curriculum yesterday, I wish I'd notice that line sooner.
Ended up buying the premium yesterday with 4 days left on it, lost something like 38 verges with the maximum of 10.
I notice the importance of the side stories while doing chapter 7 when I did not understand the references like the one to g-ramona.

I do have to say, the game is pretty well made in explaning which side stories to do if we compare it to something live Reverse1999.
